case_title: FULD & COMPANY, INC. VS. LINUXCARE, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULD & COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FULD & COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC. $47,539.92 PRINCIPAL, $5,479.46 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $53,225.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULD & COMPANY, INC. SERVED JUL-10-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULD & COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 8/15/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC.
DECLARATION REGARDING INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULD & COMPANY, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $53,261.54 AS TO DEFENDANT LINUXCARE, INC.
